hero.eyebrow: Mineral Intelligence at the Loading Face
hero.headline: We eliminate fine copper loss before it ever leaves the shovel.
hero.subheadline: SpectraFlow AI transforms every loading unit into a real-time mineralogical classification node, resolving the most critical bottleneck in large-scale mining: the low resolution of short-term block models at lithological contact zones.
hero.badge: Stand-off LIBS · Edge Computing · On-Demand ML

pain.headline: The Dispatch system is operating blind.
pain.intro: At lithological contacts, the low resolution of the short-term block model generates systematic misclassification events. The outcome is irreversible: high-grade ore routed directly to waste dumps.

problems.title: Degraded block model resolution
problems.desc: Geological model resolution at contact zones is insufficient to support real-time dispatch decision-making.

problems.title: Blind dispatch at the loading face
problems.desc: The dispatch system assigns destinations without in-situ mineralogical classification, propagating classification error all the way to the plant.

problems.title: Deteriorated Mine-to-Mill reconciliation
problems.desc: F2 deviation consistently exceeds acceptable operational thresholds, undermining short and medium-term production planning reliability.

problems.title: Unquantified fine copper loss
problems.desc: Misclassified ore sent to the waste dump represents a direct, permanent economic loss that remains invisible in standard operational reporting.

solutions.title: Stand-off LIBS scanner on the boom
solutions.desc: High-resolution laser-induced plasma spectroscopy mounted on the equipment boom. Zero contact, zero abrasion, zero impact on physical availability.

solutions.title: Edge Computing node in-cab
solutions.desc: Embedded spectral signature processing via proprietary Machine Learning models. On-demand activation upon bucket positioning: no network latency, no system saturation.

solutions.title: Instant Oxide / Sulfide classification
solutions.desc: Real-time mineralogical discrimination before material leaves the face. The Dispatch system receives the correct signal for every blast.

solutions.title: F2 KPI stabilization
solutions.desc: Mine-to-Mill reconciliation stabilizes below 2%, aligning the operational block model with the actual conditions at the extraction face.

metrics.headline: Results that impact the operational balance sheet.

items.label: F2 Deviation
items.desc: Mine-to-Mill reconciliation stabilized within operational excellence thresholds.

items.label: Tonnes per Day
items.desc: Mineralogical processing and classification capacity validated in large-scale mining operations.

items.label: Physical Availability
items.desc: Zero operational stoppages attributable to the system. The loading unit does not modify its production cycle.

haas.headline: We don't sell sensors. We sell KPI stability.
haas.subheadline: Our HaaS (Hardware as a Service) model eliminates the CAPEX entry barrier and aligns our profitability exclusively with your operation's performance.

cards.title: Zero CAPEX
cards.desc: All mining-grade industrial OEM hardware is included in the service. No upfront investment, no asset depreciation, no technological obsolescence risk for the operation.
cards.highlight: Hardware included in the operational fee

cards.title: Data-as-a-Service
cards.desc: Flat operational fee per instrumented shovel, tied to real-time mineralogical classification and guaranteed Edge node availability. Total financial predictability.

cards.title: Success Fee
cards.desc: Performance bonus indexed exclusively to fine copper recovery and F2 KPI compliance. If you don't recover value, we don't charge the differential.
cards.highlight: Aligned to F2 KPI & Cu recovery

team.headline: Geology, data, and systems. One team.

members.name: Miguel Giuliano
members.bio: Specialist in applied geometallurgy and short-term block modelling. Architect of the SpectraFlow AI analytical workflow and responsible for field validation.

members.name: Cristian Jara
members.bio: Developer of the proprietary spectral classification algorithms in Python. Responsible for ML model training, validation, and Edge node deployment.

members.name: Giovanni Giuliano
members.bio: Architect of the hardware-software integration in industrial mining environments. Responsible for Edge node design, Dispatch system interfacing, and operational robustness.

ecosystem.headline: End-to-end solutions across the mining-metallurgical value chain.
ecosystem.subheadline: SpectraFlow AI is the spearhead of a four-unit ecosystem engineered to resolve bottlenecks at every link in the process.

units.title: Mine-to-Mill Reconciliation & Geostatistics
units.desc: Proprietary Python scripts (DHSA) for volumetric reconciliation, applied geostatistics, and estimation error management in long-term block models.

units.title: Surface Engineering & Robotics — Ablatech
units.desc: High-precision industrial laser cleaning and drone systems for surface asset inspection and maintenance. Ablation technology with zero abrasives or solvents.

units.title: Chemical & Process Optimization
units.desc: Formulation and supply of advanced mining reagents for flotation and leaching circuit optimization. Focus on metallurgical recovery improvement and reagent cost reduction.

footer.tagline: Mineral Intelligence. From the face, in real time.
